- `link/stories/html-angular.md` (14 → 20 lignes, +6)

  ````diff
  @@ ... @@
   
   ```html
  -Angular Navigation side:
  -<a luLink="${…}" ${…}${…}${…}>${…}</a>
  +Routing application :
  +<a luLink="${…}" ${…}${…}>${…}</a>
   <br />
  -Browser Navigation side:
  -<a href="${…}" luLink${…}${…}${…}>${…}</a>
  +Routing application (nouvelle fenêtre) :
  +<a luLink="${…}" external${…}${…}>${…}</a>
  +<br />
  +Lien hors application :
  +<a href="${…}" luLink${…}${…}>${…}</a>
  +<br />
  +Lien hors application (nouvelle fenêtre) :
  +<a href="${…}" luLink external${…}${…}>${…}</a>
   ```
   
  ````
